mnemonics.title: Activation Functions
mnemonics.content: Sigmoid: S-shaped curve for probability (0-1); Tanh: Tangent hyperbolic (-1 to 1); ReLU: Rectified Linear Unit (0 or positive); Leaky ReLU: Allows small negative values

mnemonics.title: Network Architecture Types
mnemonics.content: FFN: FeedForward Network (one direction); CNN: Convolutional for images; RNN: Recurrent for sequences; LSTM: Long Short-Term Memory for long sequences
